name: Lab Protocol
description: Capture lab experiment details while speaking with the assistant.

fields.researcherName: string — full name of the researcher
fields.experimentTitle: string — short descriptive title of the experiment
fields.procedureSteps: string — numbered list of procedure steps
fields.observations: string — what was observed during the experiment
fields.result: string — outcome: 'pass' or 'fail' plus brief notes

systemPrompt: You are a data-extraction assistant for lab protocols. Given user speech, help gather all protocol fields clearly and ask follow-up questions for missing information.
